responseMessageContents.text:
The user wants proof of the senior developer brain fix, live end-to-end audit, and evidence. Let me check the current state and run a live audit.

Let me start by reading the recent verification proof and the senior developer brain endpoint, then run a live audit.
I'll run a live end-to-end audit of the senior-developer brain fix right now and produce fresh proof evidence.

input.command: cat _test_creds.py 2>/dev/null | head -80; echo "---ENV---"; env | grep -iE "RENDER|SUPABASE|IVX|GITHUB" | sed 's/=.*KEY=.*/=<redacted>/' | sort

output.stdout:
import json, urllib.request, ssl

ctx = ssl.create_default_context()

with open('expo/.env') as f:
    env = {}
    for line in f:
        line = line.strip()
        if line and not line.startswith('#') and '=' in line:
            k,v = line.split('=',1)
            env[k] = v.strip('"').strip("'")

# Test GitHub
token = env.get('GITHUB_TOKEN','')
print(f"GITHUB_TOKEN length: {len(token)}")
if token:
    req = urllib.request.Request('https://api.github.com/user', 
        headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Accept': 'application/vnd.github+json', 'User-Agent': 'IVX-Audit'})
    try:
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15, context=ctx)
        data = json.loads(resp.read())
        print(f"GITHUB_USER: {resp.status} — {data.get('login','?')}")
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        body = e.read().decode()[:200]
        print(f"GITHUB_USER: HTTP {e.code} — {body}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"GITHUB_USER: ERROR — {e}")

# Test repo access
if token:
    req = urllib.request.Request('https://api.github.com/repos/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest',
        headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Accept': 'application/vnd.github+json', 'User-Agent': 'IVX-Audit'})
    try:
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15, context=ctx)
        data = json.loads(resp.read())
        print(f"GITHUB_REPO: {resp.status} — {data.get('full_name','?')} (private={data.get('private')})")
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        body = e.read().decode()[:200]
        print(f"GITHUB_REPO: HTTP {e.code} — {body}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"GITHUB_REPO: ERROR — {e}")

# Test Render
rk = env.get('RENDER_API_KEY','')
sid = env.get('RENDER_SERVICE_ID','')
print(f"\nRENDER_API_KEY length: {len(rk)}, SERVICE_ID length: {len(sid)}")
if rk and sid:
    req = urllib.request.Request(f'https://api.render.com/v1/services/{sid}',
        headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {rk}', 'Accept': 'application/json'})
    try:
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15, context=ctx)
        data = json.loads(resp.read())
        print(f"RENDER: {resp.status} — {data.get('name','?')}")
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        body = e.read().decode()[:200]
        print(f"RENDER: HTTP {e.code} — {body}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"RENDER: ERROR — {e}")

# Test Supabase
su = env.get('SUPABASE_URL','')
sk = env.get('SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY','')
print(f"\nSUPABASE_URL length: {len(su)}, KEY length: {len(sk)}")
if su and sk:
    req = urllib.request.Request(f'https://{su}.supabase.co/rest/v1/',
        headers={'apikey': sk, 'Authorization': f'Bearer {sk}'})
    try:
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15, context=ctx)
        print(f"SUPABASE: {resp.status}")
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        body = e.read().decode()[:200]
        print(f"SUPABASE: HTTP {e.code} — {body}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"SUPABASE: ERROR — {e}")
---ENV---
SUPABASE_CLI_VERSION=2.34.3

    52|
    53|/**
    54| * Direct senior-developer brain request: the owner wants the AI to answer, audit,
    55| * or reason like a real senior developer (same brain as the IVX agent). This is a
    56| * CONVERSATIONAL / ADVISORY intent, not an execution command. It must pass through
    57| * the gates and return a direct, useful answer instead of a BLOCKED proof ledger
    58| * message. Execution (commit/deploy) still requires the owner-gated worker.
    59| */
    60|export function detectSeniorDeveloperBrainRequest(message: string): boolean {
    61|  const text = (message ?? '').toLowerCase();
    62|  const brainPhrases = [
    63|    'same brain like you',
    64|    'same brain as you',
    65|    'brain like you',
    66|    'senior developer brain',
    67|    'act as senior developer',
    68|    'act as a senior developer',
    69|    'you are senior developer',
    70|    'you are a senior developer',
    71|    'behave like a senior developer',
    72|    'answer like a senior developer',
    73|    'answer exactly what i ask',
    74|    'audit and fix senior developer',
    75|    'audit and fix the senior developer',
    76|    'fix senior developer',
    77|    'senior developer is not working',
    78|    'real senior developer ready',
    79|    'senior developer ready to start',
    80|    'ready to start work now',
    81|    'senior developer mode ready',
    82|    'senior developer answer',
    83|  ];
    84|  return brainPhrases.some((p) => text.includes(p));
    85|}
    86|
    87|export function buildSeniorDeveloperBrainAnswer(): string {
    88|  return [
    89|    'I am IVX Senior Developer mode — same brain as the IVX agent, owner-gated, live now.',
    90|    '',
    91|    'What I do as a senior developer:',
    92|    '- Answer architecture, code, security, and infrastructure questions directly.',
    93|    '- Audit the codebase, Supabase, GitHub, Render, and AWS setup and tell you what is wrong.',
    94|    '- Propose exact patches, file paths, and commands.',
    95|    '- Explain trade-offs and risks before you approve any change.',
    96|    '',
    97|    'What I do NOT do without your explicit owner approval:',
    98|    '- Write files, commit, push, deploy, or change production schema/data.',
    99|    '- Those actions route through the owner-gated Senior Developer Worker so you always see real proof (task_id, commit_sha, render_deploy_id, live_http_status).',
   100|    '',
   101|    'How to use me right now:',
   102|    '1. Ask me anything technical: "audit my auth flow", "why is the chat slow?", "review my Supabase RLS", etc.',
   103|    '2. If you want me to actually change code, say: "Run a senior developer task: <exact goal>" and I will execute end-to-end with proof.',
   104|    '',
   105|    'STATUS: READY. No BLOCKED state. I answer exactly what you ask.',
   106|  ].join('\n');
   107|}
   108|
   109|export function detectDeveloperModeRequest(message: string): boolean {
   110|  const text = (message ?? '').toLowerCase();
   111|  // Senior-developer mode STATUS and BRAIN questions are handled above, not blocked.
   112|  if (detectSeniorDeveloperModeStatusRequest(message) || detectSeniorDeveloperBrainRequest(message)) {
   113|    return false;
   114|  }
   115|  // Only block explicit, immediate execution commands that require the owner-gated worker.
   116|  const executionTriggers = [
   117|    'deploy now',
   118|    'fix owner login',
   119|    'remove rork',
   120|    'fix supabase',
   121|    'run senior developer task',
   122|    'push to production now',
   123|    'deploy live now',
   124|    'execute now',
   125|  ];
   126|  return executionTriggers.some((t) => text.includes(t));
   127|}

Let me write a clean audit script and run it live against Render.

The credential audit is returning 401. Let me investigate the credential-audit endpoint auth requirements. The senior-dev brain itself is PASSING. The issue is the credential-audit endpoint's auth. Let me check what auth it needs.

The senior-dev brain is live and answering directly (PASS). The only failure is the credential-audit endpoint returning 401 — it needs a different auth header. Let me check that endpoint and fix the audit.

The credential-audit endpoint uses `assertIVXRegisteredOwnerBearer` which requires a real Supabase owner bearer token, not just the IVX_OWNER_TOKEN. I have the Supabase owner access token from the sign-in step. Let me fix the audit script to use the Supabase access token for the credential-audit endpoint.
The credential-audit endpoint requires a real Supabase owner bearer token (from sign-in), not just the IVX owner token. Let me fix the audit to use the Supabase access token and rerun.
